useful_outputs: Visual topology skeleton with addressable registry and 12 unit passports
Organ visual profiles split into real/stub/locked lanes
Explicit token-texture-motion registries with performance budget and hero expensive rule
Backend-frontend truth map with fake-green risk notes
Reusable topology validator and machine-readable validation report
waste_points: Initial taskpack extraction inside repo created temporary dirty state and required cleanup before admission.
missing_tools: Repository-level utility to scaffold visual topology task outputs from a taskpack schema
recommended_script_absorption: Promote validate_visual_topology.py as baseline checker for future Visual Foundry topology tasks.
future_prompt_improvements: Include explicit schema for validation_report fields in taskpack to reduce format ambiguity.
Provide canonical organ status source registry in taskpack for faster mapping.
future_gate_or_checklist_recommendations: Add a dedicated gate check for required visual unit filename parity against registry addresses.
